TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kiring ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 38 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 37 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kiring hya' ga Calavi. tay 'llaw na Kiring hya' ga Tjatjigel. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kiring ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kiring ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kiriŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kiriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨala*i. taj ʔllaw na kiriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tjatjiɣel. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kiriŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kiriŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kiring ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 38 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 37 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kiring hya' ga Calavi. tay 'llaw na Kiring hya' ga Tjatjigel. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kiring ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kiring ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kiriŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kiriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨala*i. taj ʔllaw na kiriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tjatjiɣel. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kiriŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kiriŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
